stages.title: Direction and route selection
stages.summary: Select a medically defensible study direction and route from current evidence.
stages.goal: Choose the next research route without treating OPL transport or provider state as medical truth.

tool_affordance_boundary.policy: MAS tool refs declare available medical research affordances and safety boundaries only; they do not prescribe executor order, stage strategy, stage goal, or forbidden writes.

stages.title: Baseline and evidence setup
stages.summary: Establish source readiness, study baseline, and the evidence boundary.
stages.goal: Bind data, source, claim, and artifact refs before analysis begins.

tool_affordance_boundary.policy: MAS tool refs declare available medical research affordances and safety boundaries only; they do not prescribe executor order, stage strategy, stage goal, or forbidden writes.

stages.title: Bounded analysis campaign
stages.summary: Run the accepted analysis route within explicit evidence and authority bounds.
stages.goal: Produce reviewable analysis refs without widening claims beyond the accepted study boundary.

tool_affordance_boundary.policy: MAS tool refs declare available medical research affordances and safety boundaries only; they do not prescribe executor order, stage strategy, stage goal, or forbidden writes.

stages.title: Manuscript authoring
stages.summary: Draft and revise the manuscript against accepted analysis and evidence refs.
stages.goal: Materialize a reviewable manuscript without self-authorizing publication quality.

tool_affordance_boundary.policy: MAS tool refs declare available medical research affordances and safety boundaries only; they do not prescribe executor order, stage strategy, stage goal, or forbidden writes.

authority_boundary: no direct paper body, memory body, artifact body, publication_eval/latest.json, controller_decisions/latest.json, or current_package write outside MAS owner callable
OPL/provider completion is not paper closure without owner receipt, typed blocker, human gate, stop-loss, or progress_delta refs

ready_claim_requires: MAS owner receipt accepting the packet
independent gate or reviewer receipt when stage policy requires it
fresh refs for the exact stage work unit
route-back, typed blocker, or human gate when any required ref is missing

stages.title: Review and quality gate
stages.summary: Run independent medical, statistical, evidence, and display review.
stages.goal: Return an owner receipt, typed blocker, human gate, or route-back from independent review evidence.

tool_affordance_boundary.policy: MAS tool refs declare available medical research affordances and safety boundaries only; they do not prescribe executor order, stage strategy, stage goal, or forbidden writes.

authority_boundary: no direct paper body, memory body, artifact body, publication_eval/latest.json, controller_decisions/latest.json, or current_package write outside MAS owner callable
OPL/provider completion is not paper closure without owner receipt, typed blocker, human gate, stop-loss, or progress_delta refs

ready_claim_requires: MAS owner receipt accepting the packet
independent gate or reviewer receipt when stage policy requires it
fresh refs for the exact stage work unit
route-back, typed blocker, or human gate when any required ref is missing

stages.title: Finalize and publication handoff
stages.summary: Freeze the accepted package and return publication-facing authority refs.
stages.goal: Prepare the final inspection and publication handoff without bypassing human submission authority.
